falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes above 5000 in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this level would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by confirming a bullish trend contrary to the pattern's implied bearish structure.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 20-day moving average of Bitcoin rises above $30,000 without a corresponding increase in volatility (ATR < $1,500)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would contradict the 'blowoff' dynamics implied by the score, suggesting sustained momentum rather than a topping pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: The VIX index drops below 12 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such extreme low volatility would falsify the pattern's implied market stress, invalidating the 'HOLD' verdict's risk assumptions.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
